values.6: Slow moving target correlated with road infrastructure (terrestrial vehicle)
values.12: Mode C code / Mode S altitude code abnormal value compared to the track
values.14: Maximum Doppler Response in Zero Filter
values.16: Duplicated or Illegal Mode S Aircraft Address
values.18: Undecodable Mode C code / Mode S altitude code
values.21: Mode-1 was present in original reply
values.22: Mode-2 was present in original reply
values.23: Plot potentially caused by Wind Turbine
values.25: Maximum number of re-interrogations reached (surveillance information)
values.26: Maximum number of re-interrogations reached (BDS Extractions)
values.29: Track Update in the Zenithal Gap
values.33: Transponder anomaly (MS XPD replies with Mode A/C to Mode A/C-only all-call)
values.36: IC Conflict detection possible-no conflict currently detected

values.0: Mode-2 code as derived from the reply of the transponder
values.1: Smoothed Mode-2 code as provided by a local tracker

values.0: Mode-1 code as derived from the reply of the transponder
values.1: Smoothed Mode-1 code as provided by a local tracker

values.0: Mode-3/A code derived from the reply of the transponder
values.1: Mode-3/A code not extracted during the last scan
